sections.title: A: Complete using the correct form of the verbs in the box
sections.instructions: Complete using the correct form of the verbs in the box.

items.sentence: It took a long time to ...... Lee that poetry isn't boring.
My dad has just ...... to increase my pocket money again. It's not fair!
Stop ...... about how much work you have and just get on with it!
I ...... it'll be warm enough to go to the beach tomorrow.
We all ...... you not to trust Jerry, but you didn't listen!
Paul Fletcher, do you ...... stealing €1,000 from Leicester Stores on 24th September?
You should always ...... a puppy when it does something good.
I wish Alex wouldn't ...... me all the time. It makes me feel useless.

sections.title: B: Write one word in each gap
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: ...... my view, every problem has a solution.
Your room is ...... a terrible mess! Tidy it up!
My mum is ...... a lot of pressure at work at the moment.
Oh no! Are you ...... trouble with the police again?
We weren't ...... any real danger, I promise!
I got on the wrong train ...... mistake!

sections.title: C: Key Word Transformation
sections.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
Let's throw these old clothes away. **rid**
Let's ...... these old clothes.

I don't think people should drive fast through the town centre. **approve**
I don't ...... fast through the town centre.

Do you think that ghosts exist? **believe**
Do you ...... ghosts?

You should solve that problem as quickly as you can. **sort**
You should ...... as quickly as you can.

I'm afraid we haven't got any sandwiches left. **run**
I'm afraid ...... sandwiches.

How should teachers handle badly-behaved students? **deal**
How should teachers ...... badly-behaved students?

If you're not careful, you'll fall! **watch**
If you ...... , you'll fall!

I wouldn't buy that computer if I were you. **advise**
I would ...... that computer.
She had her car ...... at the garage last week.
He got his hair ...... at the new barber's.
I'm going to have my flat ...... next month.
She is getting her dress ...... for the wedding.
Although it was raining, ...... they decided to go out.
She studied hard; ...... , she failed the exam.
He is talented ...... well as being very hardworking.
We decided to leave early ...... we wouldn't be late.
...... finishing early, she decided to go for a coffee.
I had the photos ...... at the chemist's.
He is not only talented ...... also very dedicated.
They left early ...... of the bad weather.
She got her teeth ...... by the dentist.
...... he was tired, he continued working.

sections.title: E: Complete the sentences
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: They managed to ...... the problem before it got worse.
She came ...... with a solution that satisfied everyone.
He had to ...... with several problems at work this week.
The engineer found a way to ...... the broken machine.
She tried to ...... a solution but nothing seemed to work.
He made a ...... about the poor service at the restaurant.
They decided to ...... professional advice before making a decision.
The issue was ...... out in less than an hour.
She offered to ...... in and help whenever she could.
They were able to ...... the conflict without any outside help.
He reported the ...... to the police immediately.
The best ...... to the problem was to start again from scratch.
She decided to ...... to her boss about the situation.
He took ...... of the situation and organised everything perfectly.
